description: Unified MCP server for AgentSkin Suite — 7 tools covering API pruning, CLI reduction, token estimation, and text denoising. Compatible with any MCP-aware agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot Chat, Continue, Cline, etc.). Caveman-shrink variant wraps the server to compress tool descriptions, saving additional context tokens.

agentskin-suite.description: AgentSkin Suite v5.0.0 — unified 7-tool MCP server: fetch_optimized_data (URL→skin, 88% savings), skin_reasoning (text denoising, 14-29%), classify_url (11 API rules), strip_ansi, reduce (CLI pipeline, 99.97%), estimate_tokens, apply_json_semantic (JSON pruning).

agentskin-suite-shrunk.description: [SHRUNK] AgentSkin Suite v5.0.0 via caveman-shrink — same 7 tools with compressed descriptions. Use when tool catalog size matters.
